headline: Epstein Settlement Puts Bank Of America Valuation And Governance In Focus
summary: Bank of America, NYSE:BAC, has agreed to settle a lawsuit over its past relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and alleged failures to promptly report suspicious activities. The settlement addresses claims that the bank maintained Epstein related accounts and delayed filing required suspicious activity reports. This outcome brings a legal resolution to issues that raised questions about the bank's compliance controls and oversight of high risk clients. For investors watching NYSE:BAC, this legal...
